Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Icon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — An Icon appears in the sky during ascension to Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — An Icon is a symbol of a greater concept of reality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin has touched the Sword Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Winter Sage manifested the Winter Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Manifesting an Icon requires critical focus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Yerin needs to try to touch the Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Manifesting an Icon requires understanding the significance of one's madra and sensing it deeply.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The specific Icon manifested depends on the nature of one's madra and a core concept of their identity.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — A Sage's abilities can be tied to their unique relationship with an Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Holding the mummified hand exposed long enough might manifest an Icon.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon summoned an Icon when he was an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon is connected to the endlessly hungry Icon.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Touching an Icon requires gathering wisdom and insight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin hears a sound that is not like the distant sensation of an Icon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
